description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine SEQ_NCS_TABLE_DATA, SEQ_MACHINE_NCS_DATA, and is implemented by a call to SEQ_NCS_TABLE_DATA, SEQ_MACHINE_NCS_DATA. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.0.0. ierr = seq_ncs_flt_cntrb_data(ibus, id, points, realar, cplxar)
python_syntax: ierr = seq_ncs_flt_cntrb_data(ibus, id, points, realar, cplxar)

parameters.name: points
parameters.description: Number of data points. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: realar
parameters.description: An array of points elements specifying Array of ‘POINTS’ values specifying Ti in seconds, in strictly ascending order of Ti. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: cplxar
parameters.description: An array of points elements specifying Array of ‘POINTS’ values specifying CiP and CiQ. (input; no default allowed).
